name: repo-wiki
description: LLM Wiki pattern for code repos. Seed a persistent knowledge base from git history (init), grow it incrementally from changes or conversational context (ingest), and query it with natural language (query). Knowledge lives in a hidden .repo-wiki/ directory committed alongside your code; src/ remains the source of truth and query verifies cached claims at key moments. Zero external dependencies — pure SKILL.md, no MCP servers or vector stores.
